login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Secure access to your private account.
login.password_hint: Minimum 20 characters with uppercase, lowercase, digits and symbols
login.tos_required: You must accept the terms of use to access Zenth.
login.wipe_success: Too many attempts ({{max}}). All data has been deleted.
login.version_outdated: Connection refused by the Zenth network.
login.server_unavailable: Service temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

keygen.title: Key Generation
keygen.hint_mouse: Move your mouse to generate entropy
keygen.hint_touch: Hold your phone naturally — motion sensors collect entropy

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Join a private and secure network.
register.e2e_notice_body: Your encryption key will be automatically generated and securely stored on your device.
register.username_taken_hint: If this is your account on another device, open the existing app (Settings → Synchronisation) to add this device.

validation.password_min:
Password must contain at least 20 characters.
Use a strong and varied passphrase.
validation.password_uppercase: Password must contain at least 3 uppercase letters.
validation.password_lowercase: Password must contain at least 3 lowercase letters.
validation.password_digits: Password must contain at least 3 digits.
validation.password_special: Password must contain at least 3 special characters.
validation.password_sequence: Password must not contain simple sequences (e.g.: abcd, 1234, dcba).
validation.password_repeat: Password must not contain more than 2 consecutive identical characters.

chat.auth_required_sub: Sign in to access your conversations
chat.title: Messages
chat.e2e_notice: All your messages are end-to-end encrypted.
chat.select_conversation: Select a conversation to start chatting.
chat.select_conversation_sub: All your exchanges are protected by end-to-end encryption.
chat.self_space_subtitle: Encrypted notes, synced across all your devices
chat.lock_modal_desc: Choose a secret code. Enter it in the search bar to reveal this conversation.
chat.remove_lock_desc: Enter the current code to permanently unlock this conversation.

friends.title: Contacts
friends.error_key_format: Invalid key format (must be a 64-character hex SHA256 hash)
friends.verify_instructions: Compare this code with {{name}} via voice call or in person. If both codes match, the connection is authentic.
friends.verify_hint: Never confirm if you cannot compare the codes out-of-band.
friends.confirm_block_body: This person will no longer be able to send you messages or friend requests.
friends.confirm_block_warning: You can unblock a contact at any time from the Blocked section.
friends.confirm_remove_body: This contact will be removed from your friends list.
friends.confirm_remove_warning: This action is irreversible. Your local message history will be kept, but you will not be able to communicate without sending a new friend request.

security.title: Security
security.persist_session_sub: Do not sign out when the application closes
security.persist_session_warning: Warning: your password is stored locally on this device. A physical extraction tool (e.g. Cellebrite) could access it. Use this option knowingly and at your own risk.
security.delete_account_sub: Irreversible action, deletes the account and all data
security.sync_accounts_sub: Synchronize account data across multiple devices
security.delete_dialog_body: This action is irreversible. Your account will be deleted from the server and all your local data (messages, contacts, keys) will be securely wiped.

synchronization.title: Synchronization
synchronization.subtitle: Data synchronization management
synchronization.dialog_description: Scan the QR code with your phone to link this device to your account.
synchronization.scan_instruction_step1: On your phone, go to Settings → Synchronization, then tap 'Scan a device'.
synchronization.scan_instruction_step2: Point your phone's camera at this QR code to verify this device.
synchronization.success: Device successfully linked! Your data will now sync.
synchronization.success_reconnect_hint_named: Sign in with username « {{username}} » and your usual password.
synchronization.success_reconnect_hint: Sign in with your usual credentials and password.
synchronization.sync_accounts_sub: Scan a QR code with your phone to synchronize your data.
synchronization.dialog_body: Do you want to synchronize your account data (contacts, messages, settings) across your devices?
synchronization.password_required: Confirm your password to authorize adding a new device.
synchronization.role_new_device: Link this device (I'm the new device)
synchronization.role_trusted_device: Certify a device (I'm already logged in elsewhere)
synchronization.scan_return_btn: I have scanned - now scan this device's QR
synchronization.scan_return_instruction: Point the camera at the QR code displayed by your trusted device.
synchronization.scan_new_instruction: Point the camera at the QR code displayed by the new device.
synchronization.show_return_instruction: Show this QR code to the new device so it can scan it.
synchronization.return_qr_expiry: This QR code expires in 2 minutes.
synchronization.send_sync_key_btn: Send synchronization key to new device
synchronization.no_paired_devices: No paired device - pair your devices
synchronization.sync_key_sent: Sync key sent - scan this QR on the new device
synchronization.copy_qr_hint: On desktop without camera, copy this text:
synchronization.error_invalid_qr: Invalid QR - not a valid Zenth QR
synchronization.revoke_confirm_body: This device will no longer receive your synced data.
synchronization.error_account_conflict: Sync failed: this username already exists on this device. Revoke this device from the other account (Settings → Synchronization → Paired devices).

recovery.title: Account Recovery
recovery.subtitle: Encrypted backup of your contacts and recovery key
recovery.not_initialized_warning: No recovery key set. If you lose your device, your data will be unrecoverable.
recovery.init_subtitle: Write down these 24 words on paper. They are the only way to recover your data if you lose your device.
recovery.init_warning: Never store this phrase digitally (photo, cloud, email). Write it on paper and keep it in a safe place.
recovery.init_next: I have written down my phrase
recovery.confirm_subtitle: Enter the requested words to confirm you have noted them.
recovery.confirm_error: One or more words are incorrect. Check your phrase.
recovery.init_done_subtitle: Your key is ready. Keep your mnemonic phrase in a safe place.
recovery.export_select_subtitle: Choose which contacts to include in the backup.
recovery.export_passwords_subtitle: Enter your mnemonic phrase and a protection password.
recovery.mnemonic_placeholder: abandon ability able about above absent absorb abstract...
recovery.mnemonic_length_error: The mnemonic phrase must contain exactly 24 words.
recovery.export_done_subtitle: Your .zbc file is encrypted and ready for download.
recovery.import_subtitle: Restore your contacts and messages from a backup file.

tos.title: Terms of use
tos.section_states: What we will never provide to certain States
tos.section_close_account: What happens if you close your account
tos.what_we_are_p1: Zenth is an independent project. No investors, no parent company, no shareholders. Nobody behind us telling us what to do, what to keep, what to resell.
tos.what_we_can_p1: Technically, concretely, structurally: nothing. Your messages are end-to-end encrypted on your device before reaching us. We do not hold your keys. We cannot read your conversations, identify your contacts, access your files, or hand anything to anyone, because we have nothing to hand over.
tos.what_we_can_p2: This is not a promise. It is a technical constraint we imposed on ourselves by design.
tos.what_we_can_p3: We log nothing. No IP addresses, no connection timestamps, no usage metadata. There are no logs to seize, no history to produce, no trace to hand over.
tos.what_you_can_p1: Whatever you want, within the limits of your own conscience.
tos.what_you_can_p2: We do not moderate. We do not surveil. We have neither the means nor the will to do so. In return, we ask you not to use Zenth for purposes that you yourself would find immoral if someone else committed them against you or those you love.
tos.what_you_can_p3: We do not define immoral for you. You are an adult.
tos.states_p1: We do not cooperate with all jurisdictions in the same way.
tos.states_p2: When an authority contacts us, we evaluate the context before communicating anything, including the minimal technical data we would theoretically be able to provide. If we determine that:
tos.states_item1_body: for acts we do not recognize as crimes, being homosexual, speaking freely, practicing a religion, changing it, not having one, we provide nothing. Zero. Regardless of the legal framework invoked.
tos.states_item2_strong: The country has privacy legislation we consider unacceptable
tos.states_item2_body: legalized mass surveillance, government access without independent judicial oversight, mandatory decryption, we provide nothing either.
tos.states_p3: This is not a legal decision. It is a human decision. We own it.
tos.states_p4: We do not publish a list of affected countries. We reserve the right to assess case by case, according to our own ethical judgment.
tos.close_account_p1: Your data is deleted. On our end. On yours if you request it. Nothing remains.
tos.responsibility_p1: None regarding the use you make of Zenth. Total regarding the promise we just made you about what we cannot do.

empty_state.e2e_notice: Messages are end-to-end encrypted. No one outside this conversation can read them.

qr_scanner.title: Scan a QR code
qr_scanner.paste_default_desc: Copy the text shown under the other device's QR code and paste it here.
qr_scanner.paste_contact_desc: Paste your contact's public key (64 hexadecimal characters).
